mapper.insert: insert into collection_document (id, kb_id, document_id, create_time, isdelete) values (#{id}, #{kbId}, #{documentId}, #{createTime}, #{isDelete})

insert into col_kb (kb_id, kbname, colname, type, createtime, permission) values (#{kbId}, #{kbName}, #{colName}, #{type, typeHandler=top.emilejones.hhu.knowledge.handler.KnowledgeCatalogTypeHandler}, #{createTime}, #{permission})
mapper.select: select count(*) from collection_document where document_id=#{documentId} and kb_id=#{catalogId} and isdelete=1
